title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware
summary: Apple, Meta, and Google have introduced dedicated security modes to protect devices from targeted spyware attacks. The article explains how these features work and how to enable them, addressing growing privacy concerns from sophisticated threats.
content: Apple, Meta, and Google offer special security modes that provide your devices more secure against targeted spyware attacks. Here are how those modes work, what they do, and how to switch them on.

zh.title: 这些特殊的手机和应用功能可以帮助你防护间谍软件
zh.summary: 苹果、Meta和谷歌推出了专门的安全模式，以保护设备免受针对性间谍软件攻击。该文章解释了这些功能如何运作以及如何启用它们，解决了来自复杂威胁的日益增长的隐私问题。

title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
summary: IBM and Ferrari are collaborating to use artificial intelligence to enhance fan engagement in Formula 1. The partnership represents a new approach to redefining the fan experience through AI technology.
content: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.

zh.title: 法拉利使用IBM的AI创造F1超级粉丝
zh.summary: IBM和法拉利合作使用人工智能来增强一级方程式赛车的球迷参与度。该合作伙伴关系代表了通过AI技术重新定义球迷体验的新方法。

title: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
summary: Roger Linn, creator of the MPC, LinnDrum, and LM-1 drum machines, has shaped modern music production for decades with innovations used by Prince and countless other artists. His creations remain foundational to hip-hop and electronic music.
content:
Roger Linn lets his accomplishments do the talking. | Image: Roger Linn	

Roger Linn is a legend in the world of musical instruments. He's been at the cutting edge of music technology for decades. He created the LM-1, the first drum machine to use samples, and its successor, the LinnDrum, is one of the most iconic drum machines of all time. They were used on countless records in the 1980s, including hits by Tom Petty, Queen, and Tears for Fears. But the most notable fan was probably Prince, who used them extensively on Purple Rain and 1999.
Somehow, those are not his greatest contributions to the music world. That would, undoubtedly, be the MPC. Linn partnered with Akai to create one of the most popular and impor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 传奇MPC幕后的人物Roger Linn通过单一浏览器标签页保持专注
zh.summary: MPC、LinnDrum和LM-1鼓机的创造者Roger Linn数十年来通过被Prince和众多其他艺术家使用的创新塑造了现代音乐制作。他的创作仍然是嘻哈和电子音乐的基础。

title: Nuclear startup Deep Fission says it’s going public, again, and I have questions
summary: Nuclear startup Deep Fission is planning another IPO attempt, seeking to raise $157 million despite previous failures to go public successfully. The article expresses skepticism about the company's ability to execute its business plan and secure investor confidence.
content: Deep Fission is seeking an IPO that could raise $157 million, though investors may have trouble buying the nuclear startup's story.

zh.title: 核能初创公司Deep Fission宣布再次上市，我有几个疑问
zh.summary: 核能初创公司Deep Fission计划进行新一轮IPO，寻求募集1.57亿美元，尽管之前的上市尝试失败。该文章对该公司执行其商业计划和获得投资者信心的能力表示怀疑。

title: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: The Verge has curated 38 Memorial Day tech deals priced at $50 or less, including portable chargers, streaming devices, and outdoor gear. Featured discounts include the CMF Buds Pro 2 and Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K with significant savings.
content:
Massive OLED TVs and Sonos speakers might be stealing the Memorial Day spotlight, but there are also plenty of great deals that won’t set you back nearly as much. In fact, some of the best discounts we’re seeing are on gadgets that retail for $50 or less, from portable chargers and 4K streaming devices to cheap(ish) security cameras. There are even some solid deals available on outdoor gear if you plan to spend time camping, hiking, or otherwise enjoying the outdoors this summer.
To help you separate the good from the bad, we’ve taken the liberty to comb through thousands of deals to find an assortment of discounted products that have earned The Verge stamp of approval, whether it be a portable Bluetooth speaker, a video game, or a water filter. If you’re not beholden to $50, be sure to check out our definitive roundup of the best Memorial Day deals, which we’ll update throughout the weekend.
CMF Buds Pro 2
The Buds Pro 2 offer a surprisingly robust set of features for the price, including ANC and a transparency mode that lets you tune into your surroundings. Their included charging case also features a smart dial that lets you adjust the volume, while multipoint Bluetooth support lets them connect to two devices simultaneously.

Where to Buy:

 $69 $43 at Amazon
 $69 $43 at Nothing


Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus
Amazon’s latest Fire TV Stick 4K features support for Wi-Fi 6, Dolby Atmos / Vision, and HDR10 Plus. It also runs on Fire TV’s updated OS, which offers personalized recommendations, quicker access to favorite apps, and Alexa Plus support.

Where to Buy:

 $49.99 $29.99 at Amazon
 $49.99 $29.99 at Best Buy
 $49.99 $29.99 at Target

If you want more speed and storage than the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus offers, the 4K Max is on sale for $39.99 ($20 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, which is $5 shy of its all-time low. It, too, runs on the new and improved Fire TV OS and supports Dolby Vision, HDR10 Plus, and Dolby Atmos. However, it offers faster performance, double the

zh.title: 我们推荐的38个50美元或以下的阵亡将士纪念日科技优惠
zh.summary: The Verge精选了38个价格在50美元或以下的阵亡将士纪念日科技优惠，包括便携式充电器、流媒体设备和户外装备。特色优惠包括CMF Buds Pro 2和亚马逊Fire TV Stick 4K的大幅折扣。

title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
summary: Elon Musk's xAI has shifted toward natural gas power while SpaceX pursues orbital data centers, marking a departure from Musk's previously stated commitment to a 'solar-electric economy.' The article questions why solar power has been abandoned for large-scale AI operations.
content: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克已放弃地球上的太阳能
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克的xAI已转向天然气电力，而SpaceX追求轨道数据中心，这标志着背离了马斯克之前声称的对"太阳能电力经济"的承诺。该文章质疑为什么在大规模AI运营中放弃了太阳能。

title: Hanging out in my favorite virtual coffee shop in Tokyo
summary: The author explores a virtual coffee shop in Tokyo from the Coffee Talk game series, comparing it to real-world favorite cafes as a digital 'third place' for relaxation. The article discusses how virtual spaces can provide meaningful refuge and comfort from the physical world.
content:
Finding a cafe that fits you can be a revelatory experience. For me at least, there are few places outside of my house that I can truly feel comfortable in. I'm lucky enough to have two options in walking distance: a coffee shop that's bright, airy, and full of art, and another that doubles as a plant shop so that I'm surrounded by greenery while I write. They're third places that have become central to my life. But in the virtual realm I have an option as well - and while it's not a place for getting work done, it's just as relaxing.
The Coffee Talk series kicked off in 2020, with a direct sequel three years later, and the title really say …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在我最喜欢的东京虚拟咖啡馆里消磨时光
zh.summary: 作者探讨了《咖啡话题》游戏系列中东京一家虚拟咖啡馆，将其与现实中最喜欢的咖啡馆相比较，视为数字化的"第三空间"来放松身心。文章讨论了虚拟空间如何能为人们提供有意义的避难所和对物理世界的舒适感。

title: I have a new go-to browser
summary: The Verge's weekly Installer column features the author's new favorite browser choice. The article is part of a regular roundup of personal tech product recommendations and reviews. Browser selection remains an important aspect of personal computing setup.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 129, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, come on you Gunners, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've mostly been sick, which has meant nearly a full rewatch of Parks and Recreation while alternately napping and feeling bad for myself. But I've also been reading about Nick Fuentes and clowns, listening to old episodes of Short History Of, testing the NextSense Smartbuds while I sleep, writing in the Outerline Markdown app beta, and eagerly looking for things to do with the upcoming Flipper One.

title: Two space shuttle-era spacewalkers enter Astronaut Hall of Fame
summary: Two veteran spacewalkers from the space shuttle era have been inducted into the Astronaut Hall of Fame, recognized for their outstanding careers in human spaceflight. Their induction honors decades of excellence, leadership, and service during a pivotal period of space exploration.
content: "Two astronauts whose careers embody excellence, leadership, and service."

zh.title: 两位航天飞机时代的太空行走者入选宇航员名人堂
zh.summary: 两位来自航天飞机时代的资深太空行走者入选了宇航员名人堂，以表彰其在载人航天领域的杰出成就。他们的入选表彰了数十年来在太空探索关键时期所表现出的卓越、领导力和服务。

title: China’s shark finning could lead to US seafood sanctions
summary: A formal petition to the US government seeks sanctions on Chinese seafood imports over shark finning practices. The effort connects environmental and animal welfare concerns to international trade policy. This reflects growing pressure on nations to enforce sustainable and ethical fishing standards.
content: A formal petition to the US government calls for sanctions on Chinese seafood imports.

zh.title: 中国的鱼翅贸易可能导致美国对海产品制裁
zh.summary: 一份提交给美国政府的正式请愿书要求对中国海产品进口实施制裁，以应对鱼翅贸易行为。这一举措将环保和动物福利问题与国际贸易政策联系在一起。这反映了国际社会对各国实施可持续和伦理捕鱼标准的压力日益增加。

title: Google’s new anything-to-anything AI model is wild
summary: Google's Gemini AI model can generate realistic videos from diverse inputs with minimal effort, highlighting the increasing accessibility of deepfake technology. The tool demonstrates how convincing generative AI content has become, requiring surprisingly little skill to create. This trend raises critical questions about distinguishing between harmless AI creativity and problematic content.
content:
Just a stuffed deer having the time of his life. | Image: Gemini / The Verge	

Last year I deepfaked my kid's stuffed animal to make it look like his plush deer was on vacation.
It was an experiment to see if I could re-create the events depicted in a Gemini ad Google was running, and I never showed the videos of Buddy the deer on his adventures to my four-year-old. But it was a revealing exercise that made me think a lot about the difference between some harmless fun with generative AI and full-on slop. Maybe that Venn diagram is a perfect circle! Maybe not. But what I know for sure is that the tools to make realistic videos are surprisingly good, requiring surprisingly little effort and know-how. And that trend is c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌令人惊艳的新型通用AI模型
zh.summary: 谷歌的Gemini AI模型可以轻松从多样化的输入生成逼真的视频，凸显了深度伪造技术的易用性日益提高。该工具展示了生成式AI内容已经变得多么逼真，只需极少的技能就能创建。这一趋势引发了关于如何区分无害AI创意和有问题内容之间的关键问题。

title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
summary: Berlin-based startup Peec, which helps brands track their visibility in AI-powered search results, more than doubled its annualized revenue to $10 million in recent months. The rapid growth reflects strong market demand for tools monitoring brand presence in AI searches. This success illustrates emerging European startup innovation in AI-driven business solutions.
content: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

zh.title: 柏林初创企业Peec数月内年化收入翻倍超1000万美元，消息人士称
zh.summary: 柏林初创企业Peec帮助品牌追踪其在AI驱动搜索结果中的可见性，其年化收入在最近数月翻倍至1000万美元。这一快速增长反映了市场对AI搜索中品牌监测工具的强劲需求。该成功彰显了欧洲在AI驱动业务解决方案领域的新兴创新。
